description: Just Eat is an online food ordering and delivery platform. Its UK developer offering provides APIs for partners covering ordering, logistics, delivery workflows, and related platform operations.
summary: Just Eat UK exposes one public developer integration surface: a documented HTTP API at `https://uk.api.just-eat.io` with an OpenAPI spec, supporting partner API-key, Basic auth, JWT bearer, and JET Connect/Flyt API-key authentication depending on endpoint.
